top_signals.title: Drone strike ignites fire at major Russian oil export terminal in Novorossiysk
top_signals.summary: Falling debris from intercepted drones triggered a fire at a major oil terminal in Russia’s Black Sea port of Novorossiysk early Saturday, regional officials confirmed, leaving at least one person injured. The General Headquarters of the southern Krasnodar Region disclosed via its Telegram channel that the incident occurred during an overnight drone assault. According to ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: 70% of all crypto wrench attacks happen in France: Report
top_signals.summary: Centralized data collection is a honeypot for hackers and organized criminals looking to target crypto holders and their families, according to Bitcoiners.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
